I'm Niggy2, your assistant running on pyclaw. How can I help you out today?

content.text:
Why do programmers always mix up Halloween and Christmas?

Because Oct 31 = Dec 25! 🎃🎄

Yo, get it? Because octal 31 equals decimal 25! Ha! Okay, that one's pretty nerdy, I'll admit.

Got anything I can help you with, or just chillin' today?
